title: procris wightiana
intro: Procris wightiana, also known as Wild Balsam, is a medicinal plant species belonging to the family Clusiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, analgesic, and antiseptic properties. It is valued for its potential health benefits, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Procris wightiana is traditionally used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and poultices, often in combination with other plants, to create remedies for various ailments.
